review: actually the worst app i have ever been forced to use. every 2 times i use it i have to fully uninstall and re-install the app. it constantly stutters while loading to the point where ive had 2 orders go through at the same time. it freezes and loads forever frequently as well. Just emberassing
not useable, takes 10+ mins to load

The button to Scan Code for the prize stickers does not work. *And now the Monopoly game doesn't work either. *And I can't scan the code to login at the kiosks. I then get errors if I try to add the receipt details in the app to get the points: I can only enter the day of the purchase even the Help section states up to 7 days, and it claims I can't enter a receipt over $60 but my receipt is only $41.
